testimonials.name: Ayesha Rahman
testimonials.content: The Momina program helped me perfect my recitation and understand the fiqh of daily worship. The teachers were compassionate and the sisterhood was uplifting.

testimonials.name: Imran Khan
testimonials.content: Islamic Hubb's Hifz routine kept me disciplined. Weekly tasmi and revision circles made it possible to memorize steadily while staying focused on tajweed.

testimonials.name: Sara Begum
testimonials.content: I finally learned the essentials of prayer and daily duas. The short-term course fit my schedule and gave me confidence in my worship.

testimonials.name: Mohammad Sameer
testimonials.content: The Pre Alimiyat track prepared me for advanced studies by strengthening my Arabic and tajweed. The instructors were very supportive.
